taskDescription: Complete the crossword using terms from the anterior triangle of the neck.

words.clue: Sub-triangle containing the carotid bifurcation, IJV, and cranial nerves IX-XII
Sub-triangle bounded by both anterior bellies of digastric and the hyoid bone
Sub-triangle containing the submandibular gland, facial artery, and CN XII
Sub-triangle containing the thyroid gland, infrahyoid muscles, and trachea
Bone at the C3 level with no bony articulation, attached by muscles and ligaments
Muscle whose anterior border forms the posterior boundary of the anterior triangle
Muscle whose superior belly subdivides the anterior triangle inferolaterally
Midline cyst that moves with swallowing and tongue protrusion
Artery that bifurcates at the upper border of the thyroid cartilage in the carotid triangle
Loop of nerves from C1-C3 that supplies the infrahyoid strap muscles

overallFeedback.feedback: Keep studying — review the material and try again.
Good effort — review the areas you missed.
Excellent work! You have a strong grasp of this topic.
